body:
Hi Priya and Armaan,

Looping you two in — Armaan is a rising senior at CMU who's been building a great side project in Next.js and Supabase (The Tower, worth a look). He's looking at backend internships for Summer 2026 and I think he'd be a strong fit for your platform team.

I'll step off and let you two take it from here.

Cheers,
Raj
subject: Intro: Armaan Arora (CMU) <> Priya (Stripe Platform)
